title: BEM-742 check Claude runtime
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/handoff','governance/tasks/pending']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 15:30 (UTC+3)'

def load(path):
    p=Path(path)
    if not p.exists(): return {}
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore'))
    except: return {}
watch=load('governance/state/claude_mailbox_minute_watchdog_state.json')
runtime=load('governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json')
seen=load('governance/state/claude_inbound_seen_items.json')
checks=watch.get('checks',[]) if isinstance(watch.get('checks',[]),list) else []
runs=runtime.get('runs',[]) if isinstance(runtime.get('runs',[]),list) else []
responses=[]
for d in [Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt'),Path('governance/audit_mailbox/external_auditor_to_internal_auditor')]:
    if d.exists():
        for p in sorted(d.glob('*')):
            if p.is_file():
                txt=p.read_text(errors='ignore')
                low=(p.name+' '+txt).lower(); up=txt.upper()
                if 'bem741' in low or 'bem-741' in low or 'bem732' in low or 'bem-732' in low or 'bem728' in low or 'bem-728' in low or 'multi-agent strategy' in low:
                    decision='MESSAGE'
                    if 'CHANGE_REQUIRED' in up: decision='CHANGE_REQUIRED'
                    elif 'BLOCKED' in up: decision='BLOCKED'
                    elif 'APPROVED' in up or 'DECISION: APPROVE' in up: decision='APPROVED'
                    responses.append({'path':str(p),'decision':decision})
runtime_proven=bool(runtime.get('started_at') or runtime.get('completed_at') or runs)
if responses:
    status='claude_response_found_after_fresh_trigger'
    blocker=None
elif runtime_proven:
    status='claude_runtime_started_no_response_file_yet'
    blocker={'code':'CLAUDE_RUNTIME_STARTED_NO_RESPONSE_FILE_YET','runtime_latest':runtime.get('latest'),'seen_state':seen}
else:
    status='claude_runtime_still_not_proven'
    blocker={'code':'CLAUDE_RUNTIME_STILL_NOT_PROVEN','message':'Fresh trigger exists, but no runtime state or response file is visible yet. Next repair path: create direct dispatch task through Deno or reduce Claude workflow to recorder-only smoke to prove trigger path.'}
state={'schema_version':'check_claude_runtime_after_fresh_trigger.v1','bem':'BEM-742','status':status,'watchdog_check_count':len(checks),'watchdog_last_checked_at':watch.get('checked_at'),'watchdog_latest_status':watch.get('status'),'claude_runtime_exists':bool(runtime),'claude_runtime_started_at':runtime.get('started_at'),'claude_runtime_completed_at':runtime.get('completed_at'),'claude_action_outcome':runtime.get('claude_action_outcome'),'claude_runtime_runs':runs,'seen_state':seen,'responses_found':len(responses),'responses':responses,'operator_role':'none','blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem742_check_claude_runtime_after_fresh_trigger.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem742_check_claude_runtime_after_fresh_trigger.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-742 | Check Claude Runtime After Fresh Trigger | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Watchdog checks: '+str(len(checks))+sep+'Last watchdog: '+str(watch.get('checked_at'))+sep+'Claude runtime started: '+str(runtime.get('started_at'))+sep+'Claude runtime completed: '+str(runtime.get('completed_at'))+sep+'Responses found: '+str(len(responses))+sep+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem742_check_claude_runtime_after_fresh_trigger','status':status,'watchdog_check_count':len(checks),'runtime_started':runtime.get('started_at'),'responses_found':len(responses),'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem742_check_claude_runtime_after_fresh_trigger.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-742 '+status+' responses_found='+str(len(responses))+' runtime_runs='+str(len(runs))+'\n')
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | CLAUDE RUNTIME CHECK AFTER FRESH TRIGGER'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'If runtime still not proven, continue repair with direct smoke/dispatch path.'+sep)
changed_files.extend([str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof),'governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md'])
ops_applied.append('Checked Claude runtime state, seen state, watchdog checks and response files after fresh BEM-741 trigger')
"""
No issue comments.
